sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36300" key="e)ntrapezi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐντρᾰπεζίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ὁ</foreign>: fem. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐντρᾱν-ῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <sense id="n36300.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">parasite,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
